title: Email Finder Input
description: Find email addresses, phone numbers, and social links from any website. Free Hunter.io alternative for B2B lead generation. Supports homepage-only or deep scanning (contact, about, team pages).

urls.title: Website URLs
urls.description: List of website URLs to scan for contact information. Enter company homepages for best results (e.g., 'https://stripe.com'). Bulk processing supported.

scanDepth.title: Scan Depth
scanDepth.description: 'homepage' scans only the main page (fast). 'deep' also scans /contact, /about, /team, /impressum pages for more complete results.

includePhones.title: Include Phone Numbers
includePhones.description: Extract phone numbers from scanned pages.

includeSocial.title: Include Social Links
includeSocial.description: Extract social media profile URLs (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, GitHub).
